sourceTitle: Generative AI tools available at MIT
evidenceSnippetOriginal: No Generative AI tools, including those licensed by IS&T, are approved for use with High Risk MIT information. Additionally, we do not recommend using publicly available GenAI tools not subject to an Institute licensing agreement for your MIT research and educational activities. See IS&T's guidance for the use of generative AI tools for full details and recommendations.
